businessRules.statement: For any account, balance := Σ(credit.amount) − Σ(debit.amount). No balance is stored on the account row.
Every transfer writes exactly one debit + one credit sharing the same transactionId, within a single D1 batch().
A transfer is approved only when both accounts are active, currencies match, balance suffices. Amount ≥ 1,000,000 requires step-up auth.
If clientRequestId is present and previously seen, the original response is replayed; no duplicate ledger entries.
Ledger entry amount is strictly positive; sign is encoded in the direction column.
